description: Vancouver film production studio for narrative films, commercial campaigns, and corporate video. Pacific Northwest creative team — from concept through final delivery.
heroTitle: A Creative Production Company Shaped by the Pacific Northwest
intro: Rainscope Filmworks is a Vancouver-based production studio specializing in cinematic narrative films, high-end commercial campaigns, and corporate video retainers. We pair Pacific Northwest storytelling with full-service production — and share gear and live broadcast capabilities through our Rentals and Live divisions when projects need them.
sectionCommercialIntro: Selected brand films, spec campaigns, and corporate contracts — each built for the platform it lives on.
sectionFilmsIntro: Independent and collaborative narrative work — short films, festival projects, and long-form storytelling from our Vancouver team.
sectionTeamIntro: Directors, producers, and cinematographers who bring texture, depth, and narrative gravity to every frame.
title: Vancouver Film Production Studio | Rainscope Filmworks

description: Rainscope is a creative production company based in the Pacific Northwest, specializing in narrative films, high-end commercial campaigns, gear rentals, and live multi-cam broadcasting.

description: Rainscope Live provides high-end multi-camera webcasting, hybrid corporate meetings, virtual speakers, and live performance broadcasting in Vancouver, BC.
intro: We bring cinematic production standards to live webcasts. Using professional multi-camera setups, redundant internet systems, and custom graphics feeds, we make your digital events feel like premium broadcast productions.
showcaseDescription: A live music recording session stream captured at our Vancouver studio, integrating 4 dynamic camera feeds and direct soundboard mixes.
